misc: The phenomenon called 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition in a past Hector event
biography: Okko, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, hails from Hirsala Golf and has been a consistent presence in the tournament, having made five appearances. While the Victor Trophy has eluded him, Okko has tasted victory once, lifting the coveted Hector Trophée itself.

Known for his strategic play and steady temperament on the course, Okko is a formidable competitor. However, he has had to contend with back problems throughout his career, which have occasionally impacted his performance.

Off the course, Okko is known for his jovial nature. In fact, the phenomenon known as 'Okkotoberfest' was named after his alcohol-induced condition in a past Hector event, showcasing his ability to enjoy the lighter side of the competition.
Although he is not scheduled to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his fans will be hoping for a late inclusion in the field.
His continued presence in Hector events underscores his passion for the game and the unique camaraderie of the tournament.
